title: Fish's Create a halloween escape room
description: Modpack for building immersive escape rooms with Create, Halloween atmosphere, and music with youtube link.
body:
An immersive modpack designed for escape room creators within Minecraft. This project lets you build interactive puzzles, thematic environments, and complex mechanics in a Halloween setting. Using the creative engineering tools provided by the Create mod, you can design dynamic systems, hidden doors, gear-driven contraptions, and redstone-triggered mechanisms that bring your challenges to life. With visual effects, ambient music, and a dark, mysterious atmosphere, the experience is both immersive and highly adaptable. More than just a modpack — it’s a creative foundation for designing your own adventures.
Included mods - DeltaBox Lib - Architectury API - Music Box (play YouTube songs) - Kotlin for Forge - Create - Create Copycats+ - Create Connected - Create Interiors - Create Enchantment Industry - Halloween Mood - Dynamic Lights - Camera Mod - Corpse - Farmer’s Delight - Just Enough Items (JEI)
Join the modpack [discord server](https://discord.gg/k9QquGVf)!!!
